📊
TECNO KSA Store Visit Scorecard
v3 · Promoter + Non-Promoter + BA Dashboard
Ask your admin for the Apps Script URL, or click "Admin Guide" below to set up the backend.

Admin Setup Guide

Step 1: Create a new Google Sheet → copy the ID (between /d/ and /edit)
Step 2: Open script.google.com → New project → Paste code below → Replace SHEET_ID
Step 3: Deploy → New deployment → Web app / Execute as Me / Access: Anyone → Authorize → Copy URL
Step 4: Share URL with your team
TECNO KSA · Store Visit Scorecard v3
Sync failed Live Hui

/ 100 pts
📄 Draft:
⚡ Recent Stores
Non-Promoter Store Visit — Score covers display quality, brand visibility, stock, and in-store staff relationship. Score normalized to 100 for comparison.
Sections: X. Display (20) · Y. Brand Materials (12) · Z. Stock (8) · R. Staff Relationship (15)

X. Display & Product Visibility20/20 (100%)
TECNO products placed in visible high-traffic area (eye level / entrance)6/6

All displayed units powered on4/4
Price tags present, accurate and legible6/6
Y. Brand Materials & Identity12/12 (100%)
TECNO branding / signage visible at point of sale4/4
POP/poster materials present and not damaged/expired4/4
TECNO products not mixed with competitor shelf clutter4/4
Z. Stock & Inventory8/8 (100%)
Minimum 2 SKU models displayed3/3
Stock not empty / no out-of-stock on display3/3
Pricing competitive vs nearby competitors (BA check)2/2
R. Staff Relationship & TECNO Advocacy15/15 (100%)
BA has established rapport with store's own sales staff (greet by name, comfortable conversation)5/5
Store's own sales staff proactively recommends TECNO when asked (willing advocacy)5/5
Store staff can accurately state at least 2 TECNO product key specs5/5
